ui_design.note: UI design INHERITED from PRD-000 (v5b Flux, locked). No UI Designer this run (ui_variants=skip) — Act 3 is a port, not a redesign. The static app + poc-v5b are the visual oracle.

values: Operator brief (2026-06-11): Act 3 — port the v5b Flux static app into a real Content SDK head app against a live XM Cloud tenant, then deploy to Vercel.

stage_history.one_line: Standard discovery; scope dial (ui=skip — design locked); 3 net-new content-model decisions locked; live XM Cloud tenant confirmed; Home-first verify gate
stage_history.notes: Sitecore-aware: Content SDK head-app Act 3, App Router, NEW-site flow. Tenant built by operator from runbook; contextId at scaffold gate.

stage_history.one_line: Operator confirmed: one PRD-001 (all 5 routes, Home verify gate), operator-manual CMS build, full tenant build up front
PRD-001 (Act 3) written + standard critical review (6 findings, all resolved + folded) + prd-minimal + 4 ADRs (0009-0012)

escalations.item: Critical review resolutions: binary Home gate; static=content oracle (text-tolerant diff + operator arbiter); full tenant build up front; canonical componentName registry; smoke split (automated+manual); marquee derivation rule

stage_history.notes: Critical review standard; operator answered YES to all six resolutions. SDK-contract gate applies this run (unlike PRD-000).

stage_history.one_line: Act-3 architecture delta (403 lines): canonical componentName table (13); component-map split (4 client/9 server); port mapping; nav; editing-safe; SDK shapes cited from real .d.ts (getPage single-unwrap); 2 new ADRs (0013/0014)

escalations.item: SDK-contract gate SATISFIED — field shapes cited from real installed Content SDK .d.ts (playgrounds/training); getPage() = single page.layout unwrap, NOT Marketplace double .data.data. Verify identical at T-scaffold.

stage_history.notes: 2 new ADRs this /architect run (< 5 density hard-stop). UI skipped (design locked). OQ-A env vars scaffold-pinned (read at T-scaffold); OQ-B Marquee delivery resolved by probing Home layout at T-home.

stage_history.one_line: UI design SKIPPED (scope_dial.ui_variants=skip) — design locked = v5b Flux from PRD-000; static app + poc-v5b are the visual oracle
stage_history.notes: Act 3 is a port, not a redesign. No UI Designer / clickdummy this run.

stage_history.one_line: Baseline gate met (14 ADRs) but recommended skip: PRD-001 not yet shipped; re-evaluate baseline promotion at PRD-001 ship (ADRs 0001-0008 will have spanned 2 shipped PRDs)
32-task port breakdown (T000 operator-tenant prereq + T001-T031); E1 scaffold / E2 Home verify gate / E3 inner / E4 smoke / E5 deploy; all 7 §4c filled; scaffold=create-content-sdk-app

escalations.item: T000 = operator builds full tenant + publishes (hard prereq before T-scaffold, build-flow Phase 5.5). Not a Developer task; the head app cannot boot/probe until done.

stage_history.notes: task_breakdown_review=skip_gate → auto-continued to QA (no pre-QA snapshot). task_breakdown_style left unset for QA (Lead Dev recommends standard+smoke, not pure TDD — live-Edge port).

stage_history.one_line: TDD-lite enrichment (617→1126 lines): §9 standard+smoke; §10 32 specs (~150 checks); 13-item Home gate; 3 RED-first helpers; motion-ON+client-nav gates (PRD-000 regression); 7 smoke entries seeded

escalations.item: 7 smoke_outcomes seeded pending (5 routes + operator visual walk + prod domain) → status will be tested_pending_smoke at /test until operator records them. Real-tenant verification is not optional for Act 3.

stage_history.notes: task_breakdown_style=standard (live-Edge port; gates = Playwright smoke + structural diff + editing-safe, not pure unit-TDD). Framework hardened gates (motion-ON, client-nav, fresh-build, operator visual walk) authored into §10/§8.

stage_history.one_line: T-scaffold tenant-independent part done (T001 baseline-copy + T002 App Router scaffold + T003 .d.ts verify + .env.local placeholder); STOPPED at boot gate — needs operator tenant publish + real contextId
deliverables: products/head-application/aphelion/sites/aphelion/ (Content SDK App Router scaffold, Next 16 / React 19, 69 source files)

escalations.item: ROUTER TRAP fixed: create-content-sdk-app --template nextjs defaults to PAGES Router; plan needs App Router (ADR-0013/0014). Re-scaffolded with --template nextjs-app-router. The build-flow's documented scaffold command must specify nextjs-app-router for App-Router plans — fold back into the build-flow skill.

BOOT GATE: /implement paused. Operator must (1) build + publish the full tenant from sitecore-content-model.md, (2) paste the real Edge contextId into sites/aphelion/.env.local. Then resume /implement → T-home port loop.

stage_history.notes: Deferred to resume (tenant-connected session): T004 theme/reveal/fonts port + T-home component port (build head-app code when the tenant is real, per build-flow). No npm build run (content-sdk build prelude calls Edge — would fail without tenant).

smoke_home.description: Home (/) live-tenant smoke: 0 <MissingComponent>, every rendering shows expected content, nav works no-flicker, editor/preview safe
smoke_home.notes: Home is the hard verify gate before inner routes

smoke_operator_visual_walk.description: Operator visual walk — all 5 routes, motion ON, click-nav (not reload), both themes; no empty bands / stuck content / blank pages

smoke_prod_domain.description: Final smoke on the deployed Vercel prod domain

operator_attention.item: PREREQUISITE before /implement scaffold: operator builds the FULL tenant from finalized sitecore-content-model.md (canonical componentName table + content verbatim from static app) and publishes to Edge; gate = /api/layout-debug returns real Home layout. Edge contextId provided at scaffold (→ .env.local).

Scope = one PRD-001 (all 5 routes), Home route a hard verify gate (binary exit criteria + operator visual sign-off) before inner routes. Real-tenant smoke = automated (Playwright) + operator-manual split. ADR-0009..0012.

OQ-1 CMS-build method for templates/renderings (operator-manual default vs CLI serialize/push) — resolve at /architect-/implement; OQ-2 contextId + cloud project/env/CM host at scaffold; OQ-3 Vercel project/domain at /ship.

7 real-tenant smoke gates seeded pending (home/destinations/experiences/about/contact + operator visual walk + prod domain). Status will be tested_pending_smoke at /test; PRD-001 cannot reach clean `shipped` until you walk + record them. Real-tenant verification is the load-bearing Act-3 gate.

[BLOCKER] /implement PAUSED at the boot gate. NEXT (operator): (1) build + publish the full tenant from sitecore-content-model.md; (2) paste your real Edge contextId into sites/aphelion/.env.local (both SITECORE_EDGE_CONTEXT_ID + NEXT_PUBLIC_ lines). Then say resume — I verify /api/layout-debug returns real Home layout, then port theme + Home components.

notes.lineage: PRD-001 = Act 3 of Content SDK NEW-site flow (head-app port to live tenant + deploy). Predecessor PRD-000 (Acts 1-2) merged PR #1. Branches off main. UI inherited from PRD-000 (v5b Flux locked, ui_variants=skip).
